Title: Provides for the sale of recycled inflatable restraint systems; repealer
Summary: Provides for the sale of recycled inflatable restraint systems; allows for the sale of non-deployed recycled inflatable restraint systems in New York, provided that such inflatable restraint systems meet required safety standards.
LawCode: Rpld & add §415-c, amd §398-d, V & T L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law, in relation to the sale of recycled inflatable restraint systems; and to repeal certain provisions of such law relating thereto
